name: Doug Silkstone
title: Lead Full Stack Software Engineer
about: 15 years across engineering, product, and growth. Built and sold 3 products as solo founder. Clients have collectively raised $20M USD in early-stage funding. LLM tooling work featured in MIT's Generative AI course (50,000+ students). Author of open-source automation NPM packages. Looking for ownership of a revenue-adjacent problem with opportunities to build and mentor a team.

awards.name: Performance Marketing Award 2017
awards.detail: Facebook Messenger NLP chatbot for product recommendations

awards.name: #1 Product Hunt Product of the Week

highlights: Designed, developed, and owned all aspects of digital platform matching people for social dining experiences
Implemented merchant-of-record setup using Stripe Connect for franchise model
SEO-optimized with product/market analytics, email automation, messaging queues, revenue dashboards, and LLM-powered admin workflows
Led greenfield in-house Game Studio for top-three social casino from zero to 1M players
Built MVP game delivery mechanism and five high-stakes casino games
Hired and led nine-member team
Built SAAS app protecting 25M+ monthly sessions by detecting and blocking web extensions from leaking discount codes
Rewrote MVP to production codebase
Onboarded 80+ brands including Theory11.com
Led technical sales calls with C-Suite directors
Commercially exited in 2023
Full-time consultancy across engineering, growth, and greenfield initiatives
Clients include Contra.com, Sky, Groupon, The Motley Fool, Framer, and MIT
Lead engineer for affiliate network automation system covering 10,000+ brands internationally
Developed voucher publishing portal serving 250k sessions monthly
Rebuilt from Gatsby to Next.js, increasing organic traffic by 60%
Sold technology to Private Equity investors in 2021
Go-to-market strategy for DTC AR Spider Robot launched in Apple Stores globally
Led E-commerce project for international release
Implemented Martech and Analytics solutions
Hired and led team across digital, marketing, customer support, and procurement
Managed multi-million-pound paid search budget for 15 international websites
Built internal tools saving 240 monthly hours, cutting SEM team overhead by 40%
Company later acquired by NASDAQ-listed company
